title: toona sinensis var. longifolia
intro: Toona sinensis var. longifolia, also known as Chinese cedar or yellow meranti, is a variant of the Toona sinensis plant, a deciduous tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Toona sinensis var. longifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Toona sinensis var. longifolia is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to make capsules, tablets, and other medicinal preparations.
